display.name: Istio Monitoring Dashboard
display.description: Istio service mesh dashboard for Istio, Envoy, Pilot, Citadel, Galley, and Kubernetes resource metrics collected in SigNoz.

display.name: namespace
display.description: Kubernetes namespace for Istio telemetry and resource metrics.

display.name: service.name
display.description: Destination service name observed in Istio standard metrics.

display.name: cluster
display.description: Istio destination cluster label.

display.name: deployment.environment
display.description: Optional deployment environment. Included for compatibility; not wired because the live Istio metrics did not expose this field.

display.name: Configuration Conflicts
display.description: Known Pilot configuration conflict gauges.

display.name: Managed Clusters
display.description: Clusters managed by Istiod.

display.name: Total Services
display.description: Total services known to Istiod pilot.

display.name: Total Virtual Services
display.description: Total virtual services known to Istiod pilot.

display.name: Proxy Convergence Time P95
display.description: P95 time for a proxy to receive all required configuration after a config change.

display.name: XDS Connections
display.description: Connected endpoints using XDS.

display.name: XDS Push Latency P95
display.description: P95 XDS push/send latency.

display.name: XDS Pushes
display.description: XDS pushes grouped by type.

filter.expression: type EXISTS

display.name: Connection Errors
display.description: Connection termination and connect failure rate.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

display.name: Envoy Active Connections
display.description: Envoy upstream active connections by cluster.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

display.name: Envoy Upstream Requests
display.description: Envoy upstream request rate by cluster.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

display.name: HTTP Errors by Code
display.description: HTTP error request rate grouped by response code.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Error Rate by Service
display.description: HTTP 4xx/5xx percentage grouped by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Response Flags
display.description: Request rate grouped by Envoy/Istio response flags.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_flags EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Average Latency
display.description: Average request latency from Istio duration sum/count.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Error Rate
display.description: HTTP 4xx/5xx request percentage.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: P95 Latency by Destination Service
display.description: P95 request latency by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Request Rate
display.description: Average request rate per second.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Request Rate by Destination Service
display.description: Request rate grouped by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Total Requests
display.description: Total Istio HTTP requests over the selected time range.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Latency Percentiles
display.description: Overall request latency percentiles.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Payload Size P95
display.description: P95 request and response payload size.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: TCP Throughput
display.description: TCP bytes sent and received by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Workload Certificate Expiry
display.description: Seconds until Istio workload certificate expiry.

filter.expression: k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND resource_name EXISTS

display.name: Citadel CSR & Issuance Rate
display.description: Citadel CSR received and successful certificate issuance rate.

display.name: mTLS Usage
display.description: Request rate grouped by Istio connection security policy.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND connection_security_policy EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Root Certificate Expiry
display.description: Seconds until the Citadel root certificate expires. Negative value means already expired.

display.name: Circuit Breakers Open
display.description: Open Envoy circuit breakers by class.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS

display.name: Request Distribution
display.description: Share of requests by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

display.name: Retries and Timeouts
display.description: Envoy upstream retry and timeout rate.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS
